name: Toami Corporation
summary: Toami Corporation manufactures and sells welded wire mesh products under the TOAMI brand name in Japan. The company offers special welded wire mesh products, reinforcing bar processed products, mesh fences, etc., as well as C-panel wall and C-panel construction products. Its products are primarily used in architectural houses, civil engineering, building earthquake resistance, beast damage measures, and others. The company was founded in 1887 and is headquartered in Shijonawate, Japan.
